decisions.module_split: ms_fba_util gets 7 reusable per-model tests + Biolog stash; new ms_template_util gets full-template-model build + evaluate_template_quality + render + diff; ms_reconstruction_util untouched
decisions.template_scope: generic over any template; build whatever biomasses present, graft missing GP/GN from standard template
decisions.reaction_classification: two FVA passes per media: unconstrained (fraction=0) -> dead + directionality; growth-forced fraction=0.2 -> essential (forced nonzero)
decisions.essential_definition: FVA forced-flux at 20% optimum (not 100%, to avoid overprediction)
decisions.biolog_stash: 4 MSGrowthPhenotypes sets (C/N/S/P) target_element-constrained; built once from KBaseMedia, committed JSON in package data dir; refresh fn rebuilds from KBase
decisions.production_degradation_scope: cytosolic (_c) metabolites only; pure capability (no growth coupling); threshold 1e-6
decisions.tests: all: 7 ms_fba_util tests + evaluate_template_quality + diff_template_evaluation + Biolog stash round-trip
decisions.phasing: Phase 1 = ms_fba_util tests + Biolog stash; Phase 2 = ms_template_util (depends on Phase 1)
